title: inula pseudoensiformis
intro: Inula pseudoensiformis, also known as Chinese elecampane, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to China and is known for its edible roots and medicinal properties. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Inula pseudoensiformis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Inula pseudoensiformis can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
